summary: Evaluator verified all 22 manifest hashes, independently rebuilt the esbuild bundle (SHA-256 identical to committed dist, git diff --exit-code green = dist-parity holds NOW), line-level verified the local-env-mcp-tests CI job in .github/workflows/test.yml (3-OS matrix + ubuntu dist-parity, step-for-step identical shape to the sdd-forge-mcp job), and re-ran the Inspector smoke test (2/2 pass, real subprocess asserting exactly the 3 tools + ok:true envelope) plus the full suite (50/50). Verdict PASS with one Minor.

findings.description: local-env-mcp-tests job runs but is not wired into the required-checks needs list (test.yml:341), so it does not gate merges; Done When does not require gating. Recommend wiring in a follow-up so AC-008 protects the branch.

note: Full evaluator output (including the checked-verifications list) is preserved in the orchestrating session transcript.
